creator: fiercex@outlook.com
text:
I installed texlive-full via pkg, but the following error is reported during compilation. By checking the bug list, I found that its dependency on ghostscript9-agpl-base has been fixed, but texlive-full's component, texlive-base, has a dependency on ghostscript9-agpl-base, which has been fixed on ghostscript10. I hope that the dependency can be updated! Or fix the bug of ghostscript9-agpl-base.

===============
